description: Create a tiddler titled 'Smith Wedding Setlist' that uses TiddlyWiki's <$list> widget to dynamically generate three song lists. The section headed '! Cocktail Hour' must display songs where the vibe is 'Chill' and the genre is either 'Jazz' or 'Acoustic', sorted alphabetically by title. The section headed '! Dinner' must display songs where the vibe is 'Romantic', sorted alphabetically by the 'artist' field. The section headed '! Dance Floor' must display songs where the vibe is 'Party' and the tempo is 'Fast', sorted alphabetically by title. All lists must exclude songs tagged 'DoNotPlay'. Format each list item as a bullet point with a link to the song and the artist's name transcluded from the custom field (e.g., `* <$link/> by {{!!artist}}`) without hardcoding song titles or artist names.
